mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reg_prov_window_offset_cfg WHERE deleted = 0 AND lifecycle_status_code = 'ACTIVE' AND provenance_id = #{provenanceId} AND effective_from <= #{now} AND (effective_to IS NULL OR effective_to > #{now}) AND operation_type_key IN (#{operationTypeKey}, 'ALL') ORDER BY CASE WHEN operation_type_key = #{operationTypeKey} THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, effective_from DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
